definition_population.content: MS is a chronic CNS demyelinating autoimmune disease, classically CD4+ T-cell-driven with growing B-cell involvement; typically presents in young adults with female predominance.

epidemiology.content: The Atlas of MS 3rd edition, a global epidemiologic compendium built from country-representative survey data, documented rising worldwide MS prevalence.

sources.quote: Rising prevalence of multiple sclerosis worldwide: Insights from the Atlas of MS, third edition
Country representatives reported epidemiologic data and their sources via survey

biology.content: EXTL2 has a direct literature link: it promotes CSPG deposition and neuroinflammation after demyelination in the EAE model of MS. UBAC1 has no direct PubMed hits despite its higher OT genetic-association score (0.38) — not established in this pass. Field consensus situates CD4+ T-cell-driven EAE as the historical dominant MS model, with B-cell contributions increasingly recognized.

sources.quote: Chondroitin sulfate proteoglycans (CSPGs)...have also been highlighted as a modulator of macrophage infiltration into the central nervous system in experimental autoimmune encephalomyelitis, an inflammatory model of multiple sclerosis
Historically, MS animal models of experimental autoimmune encephalomyelitis have featured B cell-independent disease driven by CD4 T cells activated against central nervous [myelin antigens]

treatment.content: Ocrelizumab (OCREVUS), anti-CD20 B-cell depleting antibody, FDA-approved for MS (BLA761053, original approval 2017-03-28); subcutaneous OCREVUS ZUNOVO approved 2024-09-13.

sources.source_url: (no URL returned by tool; MCP drug-regulatory record: application_number=BLA761053, sponsor=GENENTECH INC)
sources.quote: BLA761053, sponsor GENENTECH INC, original approval action 2017-03-28

regulatory_trials.content: ClinicalTrials.gov lists 2,737 total interventional trials registered under 'multiple sclerosis'.

sources.quote: total=2737 (search_trials API, condition='multiple sclerosis', study_type=INTERVENTIONAL, count_total=True)

gaps: UBAC1-MS mechanistic link not established in this pass despite a stronger OT genetic-association score than EXTL2.
Full DMT class landscape (interferons, S1P modulators, natalizumab) not itemized with dedicated sources in this compact pass.
